bead.acceptance:
1. codex.Runner implements all four interfaces' methods including SupportedLimitIDs, SupportedAliases, AccountFreshness
2. Session-token-count quota source folds into RefreshQuota as internal fallback
3. CodexAuthPath/ReadCodexAccount become the AccountStatus/RefreshAccount implementation
4. package codex doc comment mirrors Supported* return values (e.g. aliases gpt, gpt-5)
5. harnesstest.RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance all pass against &codex.Runner{}
